local_setup_divergence.notes: Used an isolated default-branch worktree and the exact merged Factory controller/verifier commit.

roadmap_reconciliation.notes: Release-delivery governance bootstrap for BicameralAI/bicameral-mcp; it does not publish, deploy, or claim a released version.

state_refinement.release_state: An exact successful Atlas owner-approved status causes the trusted default-branch workflow to resolve one open dev PR and derive receipt_verified only after complete signed receipt-set verification.
states_deferred: Dev branch-protection enforcement remains deferred until the live status-to-receipt flow passes.
invariants: No canonical product lifecycle or persistence state changed.
The raw owner-approved status never authorizes merge.
Candidate code cannot replace the default-branch resolver, pinned Factory verifier, public key, WIF identity, or verified-status publisher.
Assignment verification does not satisfy topology, main promotion, publication, deployment, served identity, or product acceptance.

rejected_or_collapsed_states: Rejected owner-approved as a merge state; it remains a wake-up signal.
Collapsed receipt download, tuple match, and signature verification into one derived receipt_verified check.
minimization_review.rationale: One derived repo-local check is the smallest honest handoff between Atlas assignment authority and dev merge policy.

domain_entity_candidates: None. Release Unit, Release Assignment, Atlas, and receipt_verified are already Factory-owned terms.
factory_learning_signals: Each governed repository needs a default-branch status workflow and a repository-scoped read-only WIF identity before its dev gate can be armed.

validation_evidence.focused_tests: Eight resolver and workflow contract tests pass.
validation_evidence.syntax: Python compilation, YAML parsing, and git diff whitespace validation pass.

end_of_session_capture.notes: Factory #325 supplies the reusable signed-receipt verifier; this product PR consumes it without adding product semantics.

session: MCP Atlas Release Assignment receipt verifier bootstrap
